name: CPI AEROSTRUCTURES INC
summary: CPI Aerostructures, Inc. manufactures structural assemblies, integrated systems, and kitting services for aerospace and defense markets. Products include wing structures, engine inlets, airborne pod structures, radar housings, complex welded components, tube bending, and electrical cables/harnesses. The company serves as a prime contractor to the U.S. Department of Defense and as a Tier 1 subcontractor to major aerospace and defense contractors, offering program management, MRO, and supply chain management services.

products.name: Aerostructures
products.description: Wing structures, engine inlets/nacelles, aircraft doors, rudder islands, drag chute canisters, and other aircraft secondary structures for new production and repair/overhaul.

products.name: Aerosystems
products.description: Airborne pod structures with integrated internal systems, radar housing structures, and integrated radar housing rack systems for EW and ISR applications.

products.name: Complex Specialty Welding
products.description: Fusion welded fluid tanks, aerial refueling probes, plenums, tubes, ducts, and resistance welding of fairings and metallic assemblies.

products.name: Small-to-Large Diameter Tube Bending
products.description: Complex ducts and tubes in steel, aluminum, titanium, and nickel alloys via fully automated NC tube bending equipment.

products.name: Electrical Cables, Harnesses, and Enclosures
products.description: Wire harnesses, power control systems, fuel management systems, power distribution systems, and RF enclosures.

products.name: Kitting Services
products.description: Logistics and kitting services for aerospace and defense customers.

products.name: MRO Services
products.description: Maintenance, repair, and overhaul services for aerospace and defense programs.

products.name: Engineering Services
products.description: Program management, manufacturing engineering, tool design, supply chain management, quality assurance, and model-based definition support.

partnerships.description: CPI Aero serves as a prime contractor to the U.S. Department of Defense.
